message:
[review-fix] Clamp conformal guard windows

ConformalGuard::new(0, ...) stored a zero-sized calibration window, so evaluate() treated an empty scores vector as over capacity and panicked on remove(0). Clamp public construction to at least one slot and add a regression test for zero-window evaluation.

Validation: cargo fmt --check -p fp-runtime; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-runtime; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-runtime --all-targets -- -D warnings; ubs crates/fp-runtime/src/lib.rs.
